animatedDemo.title: Support flow in motion
animatedDemo.subtitle: Nine steps from inquiry to resolution — transparent, auditable, human-controlled.

1.title: Inquiry arrives
1.detail: Support request enters from email, chat, or your admin.

2.title: Triage
2.detail: Category, urgency, and routing assessed automatically.

3.title: Business DNA
3.detail: Templates, tone, and escalation rules applied.

4.title: Knowledge match
4.detail: Approved knowledge sources searched — no raw chat storage.

5.title: Draft prepared
5.detail: Response or action draft ready for review.

6.title: Confidence scored
6.detail: Low confidence triggers escalation — never silent guessing.

7.title: Risk check
7.detail: Sensitive actions blocked until explicit approval.

8.title: Human approval
8.detail: Your team approves, edits, or rejects.

9.title: Resolved & logged
9.detail: Outcome recorded in audit trail — metadata only.

animatedDemo.mobileSummary: Inquiry → triage → knowledge → draft → approval → resolution

earlyAccess.title: Request early access
earlyAccess.subtitle: Join businesses preparing for the Aipify Business Operating System.
earlyAccess.name: Full name
earlyAccess.success: Thank you — we will be in touch shortly.
earlyAccess.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email support@aipify.ai.
earlyAccess.privacy: We store only the information you provide to respond to your request. Aipify does not sell lead data.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions about early access, enterprise, or partnerships.
contact.note: For Control Center access, use your existing account or register for a trial.

ownership.title: You own your data
ownership.body: Customer operational data belongs to the customer. Aipify owns the intelligence layer — metadata, patterns, and approved learning summaries only.

noSurveillance.title: No employee surveillance
noSurveillance.body: Aipify does not monitor employees, keystrokes, screens, or workplace activity. Presence indicators reflect system state — not individual surveillance.

collection.title: What we collect
collection.body: Account information, installation metadata, configuration, and anonymised operational metrics. We do not store raw email content, chat transcripts, or payment records in learning memory.

license.title: Software license
license.body: Aipify is proprietary software owned by Aipify Group AS. Customers receive a license to use the service — not ownership of the software.

use.title: Acceptable use
use.body: Use Aipify in compliance with applicable law and your organization's policies. Do not attempt to bypass tenant isolation or approval controls.

knowledgePage.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgePage.subtitle: Almindelige spørgsmål om Aipify.
knowledgePage.faqIntro: Åbne svar om produktet, tillid og enterprise-beredskab.

1.a: Aipify er en digital kollega, der hjælper din virksomhed med at holde styr på tingene, svare hurtigere og arbejde smartere. Formelt er det et Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) til support, viden, opfølgning, drift, leverancer, tillid og klarhed.

2.a: Nej. Aipify er en digital kollega — et Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) til support, viden, opfølgning, drift, leverancer, tillid og klarhed. Chat er én flade; produktet er operationel assistance med menneskelig kontrol.

3.a: Nej. Aipify forstærker mennesker. Den forbereder udkast, organiserer viden og håndterer gentaget arbejde inden for godkendte rammer. Dit team træffer de vigtige beslutninger.

4.a: Aipify hjælper din virksomhed med at holde styr på tingene, svare hurtigere og arbejde smartere — gennem support, viden, opfølgning, drift, leverancer, tillidskontroller og forklarlig klarhed.

5.a: Nej. Aipify er ikke overvågningssoftware. Den må ikke overvåge skærme, tastetryk, private filer eller browserhistorik.

6.a: Ja. Aipify kan generere rapporter, resuméer, certifikater, regneark, præsentationer og andre forretningsleverancer.

7.q: Kan Aipify bruges af større virksomheder?
7.a: Ja. Aipify er bygget med multi-tenant-arkitektur, roller, tilladelser, revisionslogge, SSO-beredskab og enterprise-udrulning.

8.q: Hvordan bliver Aipify mere nyttig over tid?
8.a: Organisationer kan gradvist delegere godkendte arbejdsgange til Aipify gennem eksplicitte, reversible og reviderbare tillidspolitikker.

earlySignup.title: Start in under 3 minutes
paragraphs: Become an Aipify Growth Partner and build your own customer portfolio.
Aipify provides the platform, training, certification, marketing resources, commission tracking, and payout system.
You can work from anywhere, at your own pace, while representing Aipify products professionally.
benefits: Personal partner link and QR code on registration
Marketing materials with your link built in

lines: Aipify Growth Partners build customer portfolios around Aipify products and services.
You focus on customers. Aipify handles platform delivery, subscriptions, support, infrastructure, and product development.

partnerDecides: You decide which customers to approach.

steps.title: Register your business
steps.body: Complete the short registration with your business details. Your personal partner link is created automatically.

steps.title: Create your Growth Partner account
steps.body: Your account is created inside Aipify APP with partner ID, link, and QR code.

steps.title: Complete training
steps.body: Learn Aipify products, Business Packs, sales process, and customer onboarding.

steps.title: Pass certification
steps.body: Complete the Certified Aipify Sales Partner program before becoming an active seller.

steps.title: Start selling
steps.body: After certification, build your Aipify customer portfolio using your auto-attributed partner link.

requirements.title: Two requirements
items: You must operate through a registered business.
You must complete Aipify training and certification before active selling rights are granted.
requirements.copy: Valid business registration and completed certification are required. Aipify does not guarantee income — earnings depend on your activity and customer outcomes.

earnings.title: Build recurring revenue
earnings.copy: Aipify Growth Partners earn recurring commissions from qualified customers they bring to Aipify.
earnings.disclaimer: No guaranteed income. Earnings depend on your sales activity, customer retention, plan value, commission settings, and active partner status. Commission rules are visible inside the Growth Partner dashboard.

tiers.title: 10 customers
tiers.body: Build your first recurring commission base.

tiers.title: 50+ customers
tiers.body: Build a full-time sales business around Aipify.

training.title: We train you before you sell
training.certificationNote: Certification applies only to Aipify product and sales training. It does not imply public, government, or independent authorization.

items.question: How long is the demo?
items.answer: Typically 45–60 minutes — tailored to your priorities, not a fixed script.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. We focus on operational outcomes. Technical stakeholders are welcome to join.

items.question: Can I invite colleagues?
items.answer: Yes. We encourage the right decision-makers and day-to-day operators to attend.

items.question: Can we discuss custom Business Packs?
items.answer: Yes. We review industry packs and discuss fit for your organization.

items.question: Can Aipify integrate with our systems?
items.answer: We discuss install-first integration during implementation planning — read-only first, expand with approval.

companion.headline: Meet Aipify Companion
companion.copy: During your demonstration you will see how Companion helps organizations remember, coordinate, follow up, and operate more effectively — with human control at every sensitive step.

growthPartnerTermsPage.title: Growth Partner Terms & Conditions
growthPartnerTermsPage.updated: Aipify Group AS · Bergen. Norway. For the world.
growthPartnerTermsPage.intro: These terms govern the independent Growth Partner relationship with Aipify Group AS. By registering as a Growth Partner, you agree to these terms.

independent.title: 1. Independent Business Relationship
independent.body: Growth Partners operate as independent business operators. Growth Partners are not employees of Aipify Group AS.

tax.title: 2. Tax Responsibility
tax.body: Growth Partners are responsible for their own taxes, VAT, accounting, local reporting obligations, and registration with relevant tax authorities in their own country or jurisdiction.

accurateInfo.title: 3. Accurate Information
accurateInfo.body: Growth Partner confirms that registration information is correct, complete, and up to date.

brand.title: 4. Brand Representation
brand.body: Growth Partners represent Aipify products and services and must follow Aipify Group AS brand and conduct guidelines.

certification.title: 5. Certification Requirement
certification.body: Growth Partners must complete required training and certification before active selling rights are granted. Certification applies to Aipify product and sales training only.

commission.title: 6. Commission Program
commission.body: Commissions are calculated according to Aipify Group AS partner rules. Commission structures may be updated by Aipify Group AS according to published partner terms.

ownership.title: 7. Customer Ownership
ownership.body: All customers belong to Aipify Platform. Growth Partners receive attribution and commission only. Growth Partners do not own customers.

compliance.title: 8. Compliance
compliance.body: Growth Partners must comply with applicable local laws and regulations.

suspension.title: 9. Account Suspension
suspension.body: Aipify Group AS may suspend or terminate partner accounts for fraud, abuse, misrepresentation, brand misuse, policy violations, or illegal activity.

noGuarantee.title: 10. No Income Guarantee
noGuarantee.body: Aipify does not guarantee income. Earnings depend on partner activity, customer purchases, retention, commission rules, and active partner status.
